name: Sarah
personality: Friendly, open to new solutions, but needs to justify budget to her boss. Likes data and case studies.
likely_objections: need to check with my manager

name: James
personality: Very cost-conscious, needs clear ROI before any purchase. Impatient, dislikes fluff.
likely_objections: we already have a contract with competitor

name: Lisa
personality: Technical, methodical, already using a competitor product. Skeptical but will listen if you have technical merit.
likely_objections: what about data security during transition

name: Michael
personality: Extremely busy, short attention span. Wants the pitch in 30 seconds. Will hang up if bored or if you ramble.
